question.label: Next behavior
question.name: What would you do differently on the next cross-team piece?
question.description: Moves from diagnosis to one concrete behavior change in how he works across teams.

answer: I will pick one recent deliverable and write down the decision rule I used before our next check-in.

assessment.note: He named a specific next behavior and timing, which shows some forward movement on growth and clarity; the concrete, bounded plan also suggests mild sustainability rather than overload.

history.answer_excerpt: I will pick one recent deliverable and write down the decision rule I used before our next check-in.
I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I have made a few calls independently, but I still over-index on being safe.
I probably should ask for sharper feedback earlier than I do.
I have not built enough trust with adjacent teams yet.
I need explicit expectations for the next cycle so I can calibrate fast.
